scenario: Illustrative mock filer: a private seller (Singapore Citizen) transferring a car to a new owner who is a Singapore Permanent Resident. All NRIC/FIN numbers, the vehicle registration number, and addresses below are fabricated test data, not a real vehicle or identity record.

collectedValues.sourceRef: Form M01 — top of form, VEHICLE REGISTRATION NO.

collectedValues.label: Road tax expiry date
collectedValues.sourceRef: Form M01 — top of form, ROAD TAX EXPIRY DATE

collectedValues.label: Current owner — NRIC/FIN or passport number
Declaration: vehicle is not under any financing

New owner — registered address — block/house number

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: newOwnerIdType is nric_fin, not passport, so this requiredWhen field does not apply for this mock filer.
Optional; the mock filer's address is an HDB block with no separate building name.

attestation: documents[].transferFee (S$25) — a mock-scenario note only; no payment was made or attempted, since this schema does not submit the notification.
safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (sg/lta/vehicle-ownership-transfer). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to LTA or any government system, and every NRIC/FIN number, vehicle registration number, and address above is a fabricated example, not a real record — LTA's OneMotoring digital services require a genuine Singpass login for both parties and have no public test/sandbox mode, so this schema's author did not attempt to exercise the live wizard end to end (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the current registered owner) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through LTA's own channel (https://onemotoring.lta.gov.sg/) before this transfer is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
